title: linaria genistifolia subsp. angustata
intro: Linaria genistifolia subsp. angustata, also known as the dwarf toadflax or narrow-leaved toadflax, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the figwort family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. Its health benefits include the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use as a natural remedy for sore throats and skin conditions. Linaria genistifolia subsp. angustata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal and health benefits.
